title: centaurea skopjensis
intro: Centaurea skopjensis, also known as Balkan knapweed or Macedonian knapweed, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Centaurea skopjensis include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used to treat conditions such as eczema and skin irritations.
